name: Story - Family Seeds
description: Parallel family-story seeds for character generation. Used as a secondary narrative thread during birth and childhood.

results.description: Your household was tied to an inheritance no one considered settled, and the matter returned whenever fortune looked weakest.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: An old inheritance remained under dispute, with papers, promises, and resentful kin all saying different things.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: Your family expected a portion long spoken of as certain, which only made the dispute sharper once money and land were counted.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: A dead relative left behind enough property, rumor, and ambiguity to keep your household watchful of every letter and witness.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: Your family carried a feud older than your memory, and no one in the household spoke of it as truly over.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: A quarrel with another house had been inherited so thoroughly that even civility seemed a tactical choice.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: Your elders remembered an insult, a debt, or a wound too clearly for peace to become anything but a pause.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: The neighboring household exchanged courtesies with yours so carefully that even a child could tell kindness had become ceremonial.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: A powerful patron had once aided your household, and the debt of gratitude had outlived the favor itself.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: Your family enjoyed protection from above, but everyone knew such protection expected service in return.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: A favor once granted to your household had hardened into an obligation nobody dared call burdensome in public.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: Older kin spoke of a patron with gratitude too disciplined to sound entirely voluntary.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: A household shame had been buried rather than forgotten, and older relatives guarded it with practiced tension.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: There was something in your family history that had been smoothed over publicly and spoken of only with doors shut.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: Your household had once survived some disgrace by silence, and the silence had become part of the inheritance.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: The family carried a story everyone knew in outline and no one was allowed to tell plainly.
results.name: buried-scandal
